g.text: Reach your loyalty customers with targeted email and SMS campaigns.
Set-and-forget campaigns triggered by customer behavior.
Triggers if no visit in 30 days
Join us this Mother's Day weekend for our special
brunch menu. Show this email for 10% off your bill.
Only sends to customers who opted in to marketing
